scripts.install-all: npm run install-all --prefix "Restaurant Reservation Management System"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix "Restaurant Reservation Management System/frontend" && npm run build --prefix "Restaurant Reservation Management System/frontend"
scripts.dev: npm run dev --prefix "Restaurant Reservation Management System"
scripts.start:backend: npm run start:backend --prefix "Restaurant Reservation Management System"
scripts.start:frontend: npm run start:frontend --prefix "Restaurant Reservation Management System"
scripts.test:backend: npm run test:backend --prefix "Restaurant Reservation Management System"
